name: User Added to Administrative Group
description: Detects user accounts being added to high-privilege groups
query:
// Detect net.exe adding users to admin groups
// Trigger on admin group modifications
events from edr_process
where cmdline matches "(?i)net\s+(localgroup|group)\s+(administrators|domain\s+admins|enterprise\s+admins)\s+/add"
group by hostname
having count(*) > 0
within 60 seconds
